chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding Looking at Women

text: 4971 - وَ رَوَى اَلْأَصْبَغُ بْنُ نُبَاتَةَ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "يَا عَلِيُّ لَكَ أَوَّلُ نَظْرَةٍ وَ اَلثَّانِيَةُ عَلَيْكَ وَ لاَ لَكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4971 - It is narrated by Al-Asbagh bin Nubata from Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) who said that the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"O' Ali (as), the first glance is for you, but the second is against you and not in your favor."
